title: state.json v0.6
description: Mutable runtime state of an AI Persona. Sibling of PERSONA.md. Holds current trait/affect/mood values, active context, and the mutation log. Mutations occur via the canonical adjust_persona_state tool, clamped to envelopes declared in PERSONA.md. State mutations DO NOT modify PERSONA.md; they are operational, not spec edits.

persona_version.description: Must match metadata.version in PERSONA.md at compile time. Used by the compiler to detect spec/state mismatch.

session_id.description: Optional session identifier. Useful when state is per-session rather than persisted across sessions.

values.description: Current values for all mutable fields. Keys are dot-notation paths into PERSONA.md (e.g., 'traits.openness', 'affect.valence', 'mood.tone', 'drives.complete_task'). Each value is a number that must lie within the envelope (range) declared at the corresponding path in PERSONA.md. The runtime clamps any out-of-envelope value at mutation time.

active_context.description: Current contextual selectors that drive cold-slice injection in the compiled prompt.

task_mode.description: Active task mode key. Must match a key in persona.task_modes, or null when no specific task is detected.

audience.description: Active audience key. Must match a key in persona.audience_adaptation, or null when audience is undetermined.

additional_context_flags.description: Per-persona context flags (e.g., 'high_pressure', 'creative_review'). Used by the compiler to optionally inject extra cold slices.

memory_anchors_active.description: List of active memory anchor IDs. The compiler uses these to inject high-priority memory references into the compiled prompt. Maintained by the runtime via retrieval policies.

mutation_log.description: Append-only log of every state mutation. Provides audit trail. The runtime trims old entries based on retention policy.

field.description: Dot-notation path of the mutated field (matches a key in values).

delta_requested.description: Original delta requested. May differ from (to - from) if clamping occurred.

clamped.description: True if the requested mutation was clamped to envelope. The actor receives clamped=true to signal the floor/ceiling was reached.

tool_call_id.description: ID of the adjust_persona_state tool call that produced this mutation, if applicable.

governance_blocked.description: True if the mutation was rejected by governance (e.g., hard-enforced virtue, hard limit, scope blocklist). When true, from === to and reason explains the block.

last_compiled_at.description: Timestamp of the last compilation that consumed this state. Used by cache invalidation.

last_compiled_hash.description: Hash of the inputs that produced the last compiled prompt. Used by cache invalidation.
